peer_coaches.notes: Mobile Eats has no signed owner/operator, no Tier 2 status, and no operating-control handoff, so no graduated owner can peer-coach a new sub yet.

notes: This ledger is the mechanical NURTURE peer-coach gate for the ZestStream holding-company goal.
A peer coach clears only at Tier 2+, with sustainable cash position, operating-control, peer-coach agreement, and exactly 5% equity-grant receipts.
Legal term readiness is tracked separately in state/holding-company-legal-structure.json.
next_action: After a portfolio company reaches Tier 2 with sustainable cash and operating control, add peer-coach agreement and 5% equity-grant receipts before marking a coach eligible or active.
